title: Delicate Korean Shrimp Bowl
description: A winey, velvety shrimp dish with a festive Korean twist, served over chilled crushed ice and finished with anti‑inflammatory garnishes.

ingredients.name: Korean rice wine or dry white wine

instructions: Heat the wok over medium heat and swirl in the sesame oil until shimmering.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, sautéing for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the rice wine and stir to deglaze, letting it reduce slightly for a minute.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2 minutes on each side until pink and opaque.
Stir in the tamari, gochujang, and honey, coating the shrimp evenly and cooking for another 2 minutes.
Remove the shrimp from the wok and set aside on a plate.
Place a generous layer of crushed ice into a bowl, then top with the cooked shrimp.
Drizzle fresh lime juice over the shrimp, sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and sliced green onion, and serve immediately.
